title: Allcargo Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Allcargo Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allcargo Logistics family as a Warehouse Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allcargo Logistics:
Allcargo Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allcargo Logistics!
